scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm run docs:check-readmes && npm run check:l10n
scripts.check:fix: npm run format && npm run lint:fix && npm run type-check
scripts.compile: npm run sync:pyodide-version && npm run build:icons && npm run sync:tools && npm run clean:dist && npm run copy:pyodide && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 webpack
scripts.package: npm run clean:dist && npm run copy:pyodide && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 webpack --mode production --devtool hidden-source-map
scripts.package:noclean: npm run copy:pyodide && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 webpack --mode production --devtool hidden-source-map
scripts.pretest: node scripts/fix-css-imports.js && npm run sync:pyodide-version && npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:webview
scripts.test:all:coverage: npm run test:coverage && npm run test:webview:coverage
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build:icons && npm run sync:tools
scripts.vsix: npm run clean:vsix && npm run package && node scripts/copyZmqBinaries.js && node scripts/copy-external-deps.js && node scripts/optimize-primer.js && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-yarn --no-dependencies
scripts.watch:debug: npm run clean:dist && cross-env WEBVIEW_DEBUG=1 webpack --watch

name.description: Name of the notebook (e.g., 'data-analysis' or 'analysis.ipynb'). Extension '.ipynb' is added automatically if missing.

description.description: Optional: Description of the notebook's purpose (e.g., 'for analyzing sales data')

space.description: Optional: Name of the Datalayer cloud space (e.g., 'Personal', 'Team Project'). If specified, notebook will be created in cloud. Defaults to 'Personal' if not specified.

location.description: Optional: Explicit location override. Use 'local' for workspace or 'cloud' for Datalayer space. If not specified, location is auto-detected from context.

name.description: Name of the lexical document (e.g., 'meeting-notes' or 'notes.lexical'). Extension '.lexical' is added automatically if missing.

description.description: Optional: Description of the document's purpose (e.g., 'for team meeting notes')

space.description: Optional: Name of the Datalayer cloud space (e.g., 'Personal', 'Team Project'). If specified, document will be created in cloud. Defaults to 'Personal' if not specified.

location.description: Optional: Explicit location override. Use 'local' for workspace or 'cloud' for Datalayer space. If not specified, location is auto-detected from context.

includeLocal.description: Include local Jupyter kernels in the results (default: true)

includeCloud.description: Include cloud Datalayer runtimes in the results (default: true)

filter.description: Optional filter to narrow results by kernel name or language (e.g., 'python', 'julia')

kernelId.description: REQUIRED: Kernel identifier or alias. Common aliases for natural language: 'pyodide' (when user says 'pyodide', 'browser python', 'connect to pyodide'), 'new' (when user says 'new runtime', 'create runtime', 'connect to new'), 'active' (when user says 'active runtime', 'current runtime'), 'local' (when user says 'local kernel', 'ipykernel', 'local ipykernel'). Can also be a specific kernel ID like 'python-env-/path/to/env' or 'runtime-abc123'.

autoStart.description: Automatically start the kernel if it's not running (default: true)

environmentType.description: Environment type for new runtime creation (overrides VS Code setting)

durationMinutes.description: Runtime duration in minutes for new runtime creation (overrides VS Code setting)

index.description: Insert position (0-based index). If omitted, cell is inserted at the end.

indices.description: Array of cell indices (0-based) to delete. Cells will be deleted in reverse order (highest index first) to prevent index shifting.

includeOutputs.description: Whether to include cell outputs in the response (default: true)

index.description: Cell index to execute (0-based). If omitted, executes the currently active cell.

timeoutSeconds.description: Execution timeout in seconds. If omitted, no timeout is enforced (normal Jupyter behavior).

progressInterval.description: Progress update interval in seconds when stream=true (default: 5)

afterId.description: Position to insert block: 'TOP' for beginning, 'BOTTOM' for end, or a specific block ID

ids.description: Array of block IDs to delete

timeoutSeconds.description: Execution timeout in seconds. If omitted, no timeout is enforced (normal Jupyter behavior).

progressInterval.description: Progress update interval in seconds when stream=true (default: 5)
